summary: Frontend UI testing completed for Student Management /add-student page. All 5 requested features tested and working correctly. Login page works, student management page displays with all action buttons, import interface shows correctly with all required fields, and both 'Choose Excel File' and 'Download Template' buttons are present and functional.

issues: React Native Web TouchableOpacity buttons don't respond to standard Playwright click() - requires custom JavaScript click via .r-1loqt21 class selector

critical_code_review_comments: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is configured to https://attendance-debug-1.preview.emergentagent.com in console logs - appears to be different from the test URL
Import interface correctly requires both القسم (Department) and المقرر (Course) before enabling file selection button
Add Student form correctly requires المقرر (Course) as mandatory field for new students
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testing completed successfully. TouchableOpacity elements in React Native Web require JavaScript evaluation with .r-1loqt21 class selector to click. Standard Playwright click() doesn't work. Import feature UI is complete with: department dropdown, level dropdown, section input, course dropdown, 'Choose Excel File' button (disabled until dept+course selected), and 'Download Template' button.

1_login_page.details: Login page loads correctly with username/password fields and login button. Admin credentials (admin/admin123) work correctly.

2_student_management_page.details: Page /add-student shows correctly with three action buttons: 'إضافة طالب' (Add Student - blue), 'تحديد' (Select - grey), 'استيراد' (Import - orange)

3_import_interface.details: Clicking 'استيراد' button opens import settings panel with: القسم (Department) dropdown, المستوى (Level) dropdown, الشعبة (Section) text input, المقرر (Course for auto-enrollment) dropdown

4_excel_file_button.details: 'اختيار ملف Excel' button is present. Initially grey/disabled when department and course not selected. Becomes green/enabled when both are selected.

5_download_template_button.details: 'تحميل القالب' button is present and clickable. Template download API is at /api/template/students (requires authentication).

additional_observations.add_student_form: Form contains: رقم الطالب (Student ID), الاسم الكامل (Full Name), القسم (Department), المستوى (Level), الشعبة (Section - optional), المقرر (Course - required for new students), رقم الهاتف (Phone), كلمة المرور (Password), إلغاء (Cancel), حفظ (Save)
additional_observations.selection_mode: تحديد button activates multi-select mode with checkboxes for bulk delete operations
additional_observations.student_list: Shows 85 students with filters for department, level, and section
